This repository implements the SENTINEL Security Operations System.

Stack:
React + TypeScript + Tailwind
Rust + Axum backend
PostgreSQL database

Design style:
SOC command center dashboard.

All new features must include:

backend service
API endpoint
frontend component
dashboard integration
